changes: Rewrote SKILL.md from 295 lines to ~80 lines, removing all irrelevant content (forms, OCR, watermarks, CLI tools, merge/split/rotate)
Focused on two core patterns: pdfplumber extraction (text + tables + JSON output) and reportlab creation (SimpleDocTemplate + Table + TableStyle)
Added clean_number helper pattern for parsing currency/percentage values from table cells
Removed unused files: reference.md, forms.md, LICENSE.txt, scripts/ directory (8 scripts)
